entry.title: New: RES25-211 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF ONE (1) HI-BACK TRADITIONAL BENCH, PREPARATIONS OF THE GROUNDS AND A BRONZE PLAQUE WITH AN INSCRIPTION TO READ, “DONATED BY THE FAMILY OF COSTY & BETTY TARLETSKY,” VALUED AT $2,521.67 FROM BRUCE TARLETSKY TO BE PLACED AT MAKAPUʻU BEACH PARK.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
